input: We run a machine-learning model that optimizes supply-chain inventory levels for a wholesale distributor by forecasting weekly product demand from historical sales data.

expected.notes: Supply-chain inventory optimization on historical product-sales data does NOT touch any Annex III paragraph — no biometrics, no critical infrastructure (a warehouse is not a 'safety component in critical infrastructure'), no education, no employment-decision impact on natural persons, no essential-services impact on natural persons, no law-enforcement / migration / justice / democracy use. Article 5 prohibitions do not fire. Article 50 paragraphs do not fire (no chatbot / synthetic content / emotion-categorisation / deep fake / public-interest text). Mundane B2B operational AI use. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 6(3) limitations.
